design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass ok; hero_math max-width=1120px 2–3 lines; bento_density grid-auto-flow:dense verified; label_sweep competitors mentioned; button_contrast black/white checked; animations guarded; accessibility basics included.
headline: Super vs Folk — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair comparison for people evaluating Super against Folk. Folk sits within the broader automation and assistant market. Super is purpose-built for agents that operate real computers and reuse a computer-use cache, making repeated workflows faster and cheaper over time without inventing prices or benchmarks.
